title: piptocarpha quadrangularis
intro: Piptocarpha quadrangularis, also known as the 'tree-of-the-forest', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Piptocarpha quadrangularis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or using it as a decoction in traditional medicine.
